name: PBL
description: Permutation of Both Layers — 6 cases. Solves both layers simultaneously on the 2x2 cube after OLL. Part of the Ortega method.

algorithms.notation: y R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R'

alternatives.notation: y R' F R F' R U2 R' U R U2 R'

alternatives.notation: y2 R2 U' R2 U2 F2 U' R2
